# Viva Españiel

> Professional dog transport service between Spain and the United Kingdom.

## About

Viva Españiel is a British company founded by Jon Brown in 2019, specialising in road transport for dogs between Spain and the UK — in both directions (UK → Spain and Spain → UK).

Jon has over 16 years of experience in the transport industry and personally oversees every journey.

## Service

- **Routes**: Door-to-door between any UK address and any Spanish address
- **Direction**: UK → Spain and Spain → UK (both directions)
- **Schedule**: Departures during the second week of each month
- **Pricing**: From £495 per dog, plus UK mileage at 50p/mile
- **Booking fee**: £95 to secure a spot, balance on travel day

## Why Choose Viva Españiel

- DEFRA Approved Type 2 Transporter
- Climate-controlled vehicles (AC and heating)
- Live GPS tracking with regular photo updates sent to owners
- Comfort breaks every 2–3 hours
- Vet health checks before and after every journey
- 4.9 Google rating from 186 reviews

## Contact

- Website: https://vivaespaniel.com/
- Email: hello@vivaespaniel.com
- Phone: +44 800 123 4567

## Booking

Dogs can be booked online at https://vivaespaniel.com/ — instant quote calculator, then secure the spot with a £95 booking fee via PayPal or bank transfer.
